description.en: Two-stage informed consent for EMR: discussion of the procedure, alternatives, recurrence risk, individualised complication estimates, anticoagulant management, prophylactic antibiotics, and post-procedure surveillance plans.

criteria.en: Discusses basic procedure and consent under supervision.
Independently conducts a two-stage consent discussion covering all aspects in Rec 10 sub-items (i)–(v); tailors to patient comorbidity and centre data.
Teaches communication skills; manages consent for complex/high-risk cases.
